A fragment that allows users to edit an existing event.

END_AFTER_EVENT - Enum constant in enum class com.example.eventsapp.EventValidator.PeriodResult
Registration end date is after the event date.

RecyclerView adapter used to display enrolled entrants.

Triggers when the organizer cancels an enrolled entrant.
Entrant - Class in com.example.eventsapp
Represents an applicant/entrant for an event waitlist.

Enumeration of possible statuses for an entrant.
EntrantAdapter - Class in com.example.eventsapp
Adapter class for a RecyclerView that displays a list of Entrant objects.

Constructs an EntrantAdapter.
EntrantAdapter.OnCancelEntrantListener - Interface in com.example.eventsapp
Triggers when the organizer cancels an invited entrant.
EntrantAdapter.OnViewLocationListener - Interface in com.example.eventsapp
Opens the map focused on this entrant (when they have coordinates).
EntrantMapFragment - Class in com.example.eventsapp
Read-only OSMDroid map that visualises where entrants joined the waitlist for a given event.

Represents an event in the EventsApp system.

exportToCsv(Context, Uri, String[], List<T>, CSVExporter.CsvRowMapper<T>) - Static method in class com.example.eventsapp.CSVExporter
Writes items to the file pointed to by uri in CSV format, using the provided headers as the first row and mapper to convert each item.
